_meta.auditedBy: Phase 1 runtime audit — codebase + server inspection
_meta.note: Update _meta.audited and commit SHAs when any section is manually re-verified. Script list and public routes are CI-checked on every push.

activeServices.title: Active Runtime Services
activeServices.provenanceNote: Verified via systemctl + crontab on 2026-03-29. Route count derivable from GET /api/openapi.json.

items.name: Signal API (FastAPI)
items.note: 117 routes · uvicorn :8100 · ~5,500 lines

items.name: signal-api systemd service
items.note: Managed by systemctl on DigitalOcean droplet

items.name: signal-db-backup
items.note: Daily · 14-day retention · deploy/backup_db.py

backgroundScripts.title: Background Scripts — Server-Deployed
backgroundScripts.provenanceNote: File list is CI-checked against second_brain/*.py on every push to SecondBrain master. Cron status verified clean 2026-03-29. Ownership and risk labels are curated-metadata.
backgroundScripts.footerNote: crontab verified clean — all passive unless invoked manually

items.name: auto_reply_pending.py
items.note: Email auto-reply automation · pre-Signal era · no tenant isolation

items.name: billing.py
items.note: Stripe billing library · imported by api.py · do not run directly

items.note: ConnectWise client sync · Python 3.8 compatible · no tenant isolation

items.name: detect_reply_needed.py
items.note: Email reply detection · pre-Signal era · no tenant isolation

items.name: embeddings.py
items.note: Phase 43 semantic retrieval layer · not yet wired to production ingestion path

items.name: error_codes.py
items.note: Canonical error string constants · imported by api.py · do not rename constants

items.note: Global intelligence layer · imported by api.py · Phase 21

items.risk: Writes processed_messages with workspace_id=default if invoked directly. Import retained for backward compat only.

items.name: ingestion.py

items.note: Hardcoded /a0/usr/workdir — container-bound path · cannot run on server

items.note: smtplib — DigitalOcean blocks 465/587 · hardcoded recipient scotteverett@ipquest.net · cannot deliver

devTools.title: Dev-Only Tools
devTools.provenanceNote: PID file and gateway log inspected 2026-03-29. Risk label is curated. Re-verify if discord_bot.py is modified.
devTools.footerNote: not for production server — containment documented in source

items.name: discord_bot.py
items.note: Runs in dev container against local second_brain.db · last gateway: 2026-03-10
items.risk: NO tenant isolation — writes ticket_notes/tickets by ticket_key only. Must not be pointed at production DB.

publicRoutes.title: Public Unauthenticated Routes
publicRoutes.provenanceNote: CI-checked against BYPASS_PATHS in src/middleware.ts on every push. Any route not in this list that appears in BYPASS_PATHS is flagged as an anomaly. Expected designation is curated-metadata.
publicRoutes.footerNote: expected surfaces — any BYPASS_PATHS divergence fails CI

items.name: /login
items.note: Custom JWT login

items.name: /signup
items.note: Turnstile protected · creates tenant_users row only

items.name: /sso-callback
items.note: SSO callback handler

items.name: /redirect
items.note: Auth middleware redirect handler

items.name: /pm/redirect
items.note: PM-scoped redirect handler

items.name: /pm/onboarding
items.note: Post-signup workspace creation step · email_verified=1 required for workspace creation

items.name: /invite
items.note: Invite token consumption · preserved through signup redirect

items.name: /forgot-password
items.note: Turnstile protected

items.name: /reset-password
items.note: Token in query param

items.name: /verify-email
items.note: Token in query param · expires 24h

items.name: /verify-pending
items.note: Polls /api/auth/me every 5s

deprecatedSurfaces.title: Deprecated Surfaces
deprecatedSurfaces.provenanceNote: 410 handler presence in api.py is code-verifiable. Deletion gate condition is curated-metadata.
deprecatedSurfaces.footerNote: retained pending deletion gate — do not add new callers

items.name: POST /api/ingest/run
items.note: Returns 410 Gone · emits ingest.deprecated.410 metric · delete after 7-day zero-hit window
items.risk: Any caller still using this path will silently fail ingestion (410 returned).

items.name: ingest_emails_imap.py (direct invocation)
items.note: Deprecation header added · gated on /api/ingest/run zero-hit window · import retained in api.py for legacy compat
